Who I Am

Accounting That Actually
Makes Sense

"Clean books aren't just an accounting exercise — they're how business owners finally understand where their money is going."

Nazmus Sakib is a Khulna-based MBA-qualified accountant and QuickBooks Online Certified ProAdvisor with over 5 years of hands-on bookkeeping, tax compliance, and financial reporting experience. He has prepared and submitted 500+ individual income tax returns through the NBR portal and has worked across e-commerce, real estate, construction, healthcare, and non-profits. Clients in the US, UK, Canada, and Australia retain his services for one reason: books delivered accurately, on time, every single month — with no surprises at year-end.

Upwork Job History

Active and completed contracts on Upwork, covering equity compensation tax, bookkeeping, payroll, and financial reporting engagements.

In Progress
Fixed Price · Mar 23, 2026 – Present
Wash Sale Reconciliation for Employee Stock Options
Reconciling wash sale adjustments on employee stock option transactions (RSUs, ISOs, NQSOs) using brokerage statements and Form 1099-B. Ensuring accurate cost basis tracking, disallowed loss calculations, and Schedule D-ready output for the client's tax advisor.

✓ Completed
Hourly · Jan 2026 – Mar 2026
QuickBooks Cleanup & Monthly Bookkeeping — E-Commerce Store
Full QBO cleanup of 14 months of miscategorized transactions for a Shopify-based retailer. Reconciled bank accounts, credit cards, and Stripe payouts. Delivered CPA-ready books and set up a monthly bookkeeping workflow from scratch.
QuickBooksShopifyBank ReconciliationCleanup
✓ Completed
Fixed Price · Nov 2025 – Jan 2026
Payroll Reconciliation & Year-End Payroll Reports
Reconciled 12 months of payroll data for a US-based construction firm using QuickBooks Payroll and Gusto. Prepared W-2 summaries, verified payroll tax liabilities, and produced year-end reconciliation reports for the client's CPA review.
PayrollGustoW-2Year-EndQBO Payroll
✓ Completed
Hourly · Sep 2025 – Nov 2025
3-Year Catch-Up Bookkeeping for Real Estate LLC
Reconstructed and cleaned three years of books for a real estate LLC with multiple properties. Set up property-level tracking in QBO, reconciled all bank and escrow accounts, and delivered audit-ready financials for a pending bank loan application.
Catch-Up BookkeepingReal EstateEscrowQBO
✓ Completed
Fixed Price · Jul 2025 – Sep 2025
IOLTA Trust Account Reconciliation for Law Firm
Performed monthly IOLTA trust account reconciliation for a US law firm, ensuring client funds were segregated correctly per state bar requirements. Delivered three-way reconciliation reports (bank, ledger, client ledger) for each period.
IOLTALaw FirmTrust AccountingThree-Way Reconciliation
✓ Completed
Hourly · Apr 2025 – Jul 2025
Amazon FBA Inventory & COGS Bookkeeping
Set up Amazon Seller Central integration with QuickBooks Online for an FBA seller with 200+ SKUs. Implemented COGS tracking per product line, reconciled Amazon payouts and fees monthly, and built an inventory valuation report for the client's accountant.
Amazon FBACOGSInventoryQuickBooksSeller Central
What's on Offer

Full-Spectrum
Accounting Services

From daily transaction management to CPA-ready financials — every service is built around accuracy, speed, and zero tolerance for errors.

01
📒

Monthly Bookkeeping

Transaction categorization, ledger maintenance, and reconciliation delivered within 5 business days every month.

02
⚙️

QuickBooks Setup & Cleanup

Custom Chart of Accounts, migration from Wave, Xero, or FreshBooks, and correction of miscategorized entries.

03
🏦

Bank & Card Reconciliation

Bank, credit card, and loan account reconciliation with discrepancy flags and full supporting documentation.

04
📊

Financial Reporting

P&L, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow, and Variance Analysis — designed for business owners, not just CPAs.

05
🧾

Tax Preparation Support

CPA-ready books, 1099 processing, e-Return submission, and BD income tax compliance under the 1984 Ordinance.

06
🔄

Catch-Up Bookkeeping

Months or years of backlog cleaned up precisely — ideal for audit prep, funding rounds, or tax season.

07
💸

Payroll Processing

Full payroll compliance via Gusto, ADP, and QBO Payroll, including reconciliation and payroll tax reporting.

08

E-Commerce Integration

Wash Sale Reconciliation
